retrieved_rules.source_citation: Inland Revenue Department DIPN 21 (Revised), Paragraph 45(e) & 46 - Other Profits & Apportionment
retrieved_rules.reasoning: The transaction involves provision of software development services, which are performed by an overseas entity to an overseas related party. The locality of service fee income is determined by where the services are performed. Since the services are provided by an overseas entity, the income may not be fully taxable in Hong Kong.

retrieved_rules.source_citation: Inland Revenue Department DIPN 21 (Revised), Paragraph 51-52 - Group Service Companies
retrieved_rules.reasoning: The transaction involves a related party, but there is no specific indication that support services are rendered substantially in Hong Kong. Therefore, the rule does not apply directly to this transaction.

evidence_requests: Confirmation of the location where the software development services were performed
narrative_template: {{engine:service_value}} earned by an overseas entity for providing software development services to an overseas related party may not be fully taxable in Hong Kong as the services were performed outside of the jurisdiction.
